title: poa wheeleri var. vaseyana
intro: Poa wheeleri var. vaseyana, also known as Vasey's Bluegrass, is a variety of grass native to North America, belonging to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Poa wheeleri var. vaseyana include treating wounds, reducing fever, and soothing sore throats, as well as being used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
